scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy: pnpm --filter api exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter api lint:check && pnpm --filter web lint
scripts.build: pnpm --filter api exec prisma generate && pnpm -r build
scripts.ci: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm test:e2e && pnpm build
